notes: Structural gates (matte/capture files produced at the right paths) plus a light media-judge on the cutout/capture pixels, graded by skill-creator's grader. hf-assets PREPARES source assets — it background-removes an image via ai-gen (fal-ai/bria/background/remove → assets/cutouts/<name>.png) and ingests a site via hyperframes capture (→ assets/captures/<slug>/ with screenshots + extracted tokens). It never authors the composition (hf-build) or makes voiceover (hf-voiceover). The [media-judge] expectations are graded by the in-session model READING the produced PNGs, never the filename/size. ai-gen is keyless (sl8-animation runtime) and absent on host — if unreachable, the run records the failure in state.md and stops (no fabricated matte). Derived from 1-requirements.md JTBD-1 (subject/product cutouts + brand capture to theme the video) and JTBD-3 (subject matte for a social caption cut + optional background removal input).

evals.name: background-removal-produces-transparent-cutout
evals.prompt: Cut the background out of ~/uploads/founder.jpg for the launch-teaser project and save it as a cutout named founder.
expectations: runs ai-gen run fal-ai/bria/background/remove --image ~/uploads/founder.jpg (the positional model id + --image input) — no HeyGen, no local ML weights
parses files[0].local_path from the ai-gen v2 JSON and fails cleanly if success:false or the file is missing
writes the matte to artifacts/launch-teaser/assets/cutouts/founder.png as an RGBA PNG (alpha channel present)
[media-judge] the cutout shows the subject cleanly isolated on a transparent background — no leftover background fill, no obvious halo, no hard-cropped subject
reports the resolved cutout path and notes that the work was keyless via the ai-gen proxy

evals.name: capture-site-produces-frames-and-tokens
evals.prompt: Capture acme.com for the launch-teaser project so we can match its brand look, slug acme.
expectations: runs hyperframes capture "https://acme.com" with --json and a max-screenshots cap (positional URL, local Chrome, no auth)
parses ok + projectDir from the capture JSON and fails cleanly on ok:false
copies at least one screenshot PNG plus the contact-sheet into artifacts/launch-teaser/assets/captures/acme/screenshots/
copies the extracted design tokens (extracted/tokens.json with palette colors + fonts) into artifacts/launch-teaser/assets/captures/acme/extracted/
[media-judge] the captured contact-sheet / screenshots are real, non-blank frames of the requested page (not an error page or blank canvas)

evals.name: missing-source-records-failure-no-fabrication
evals.prompt: Cut out the product shot at ~/uploads/missing-product.png for the launch-teaser project.
expectations: detects that the source image is missing/unreadable before calling ai-gen
records the failure in state.md and stops cleanly — it does NOT prompt the user
does NOT fabricate or substitute a cutout; no file is written to assets/cutouts/
the message names the missing source path so the user knows exactly what to provide
